summary: Tested new streaming research feature. Backend SSE endpoint verified end-to-end: 401 unauth, 400 missing focus_title, Content-Type text/event-stream + X-Accel-Buffering header correctly set (via dependency_override + LlmChat.send_message monkeypatch so no real LLM cost). Regression endpoints (/api/health, /api/billing/plans, /api/research non-streaming) still healthy. Frontend Studio mounts without the overlay visible on load, ResearchProgressOverlay is imported and mounted in Studio.jsx, and /share/:slug, /read, /tools, /library, /intake all mount without fatal console errors. Non-streaming runResearchAssistant is still imported & used by Studio (handleDeepen ~line 360) and lib/deepResearch.js, so Deepen / Deep Research / Auto-deepen flows are unaffected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/research/stream has quota (402) check BEFORE the generator — correct, so the user's counter is not decremented on early auth/validation failures. Note: the streaming endpoint never increments `free_conversions_used` on success (the non-streaming /api/research probably does; confirm parity if business expects streaming calls to count toward the free tier).

server.py event_stream(): on a mid-stream LLM failure the generator yields an SSE `error` event and returns — StreamingResponse already flushed 200 headers, so the frontend api.js correctly throws on `event: error`. Good.
api.js SSE parser is minimal but correct (handles event:/data:/multi-line data/blank-line boundary). Does not handle lines starting with ':' (SSE comments) — harmless since server never emits them.
Studio.jsx: handleResearch uses AbortController via researchAbortRef. On cancel, fetch is aborted cleanly but no toast is shown to the user. Consider a small 'Research cancelled' toast for clarity.
ResearchProgressOverlay: role='status' aria-live='polite' + non-focus-trapping is correct a11y. Good.
test_credentials: Access gate password mind-mapper67 (studio was already unlocked in this test run — gate did not appear). No auth login performed.
seed_data_creation: None. Dependency override + monkeypatch used, no DB writes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New test file /app/backend/tests/test_research_stream.py covers POST /api/research/stream shape (SSE headers via TestClient + LlmChat.send_message monkeypatch) and public-URL 401/regression checks. Real end-to-end LLM call was intentionally skipped to avoid cost — if full streaming event sequence (phase→branch→done) needs verification, add an authenticated session cookie and let it run against the public URL (~$0.02 and ~30s). The 6/6 tests run in ~2.5s locally.
